title: routine.v1
description: A saved recurring/event unit — (name, trigger, plan). A routine is the authoring entity the user creates (e.g. with /routine); it COMPILES DOWN to a schedule.v1 cron job (for kind=scheduled) or an event-source subscription (kind=event) whose body is a unit.v1 Invocation. A higher-level wrapper over the sealed scheduler — it adds no new execution mechanism.

cron.description: cron expression when kind=scheduled (compiled to a schedule.v1 job)

event.description: event name when kind=event, e.g. email.received

plan.description: WHAT the unit does each fire — either a workspace plan doc (ref) or an inline prompt. Compiles to the unit.v1 Invocation's plan.

prompt.description: inline plan prompt (when no plan doc is authored)
